phases.phase: Phase 1: Shortlist + virtual tours + book travel
phases.focus: Lock down candidates, get FaceTime tours, book GTA trip before flights spike

items.action: Confirm CPSO independent practice status — call registration line if any pending CCFP-EM verification
items.why: Cannot work July 3 shift without active CPSO certificate. Often the longest pole.

items.action: Confirm CMPA membership active for ON Type 5 (EM) coverage — call to switch from MB province code
items.why: Province-specific fee structure; coverage gap = uninsurable shift

items.action: Email/call Credit Valley Hospital (Trillium Health Partners) HR + ED Chief's office: confirm onboarding timeline, IT ticket, badge appointment, Epic/Meditech training dates
items.why: THP uses Epic — training slots fill; badge office requires in-person ID verification

items.action: Build shortlist of 15 buildings within 15-min drive of Credit Valley (Erin Mills, Streetsville, Sheridan, Mississauga Rd corridor) — pet-friendly only
items.why: Commute matters for night shifts; pet-friendly cuts inventory ~60%

items.action: Call all 15 leasing offices: confirm July 1 availability, pet policy, deposit, parking, in-suite laundry
items.why: July 1 is peak demand in GTA; desirable units gone within days of listing

items.action: Narrow to 8-10 finalists; request floorplans + utility cost averages
items.why: Need to compare apples-to-apples before viewing trip

items.action: Schedule FaceTime/virtual tours for all 8-10 finalists this week
items.why: Pre-screens out duds before paying for flights

items.action: Book flights Brandon (YBR/YWG) to Toronto (YYZ) for May 25-28 viewing trip
items.why: Flight prices climb ~30% inside 14-day window

items.action: Book hotel/Airbnb in Mississauga for May 25-28 (near Square One or Erin Mills)
items.why: Need a base for back-to-back viewings

items.action: Conduct 4-5 FaceTime tours; take notes on natural light, noise, elevator wait, hallway smell
items.why: Things photos hide

items.action: Get 3 cross-Canada mover quotes (Atlas Van Lines, Two Small Men, AMJ Campbell, Real Canadian Movers) for Brandon -> Mississauga
items.why: 1500km moves book 4+ weeks out for July 1 — peak season

items.action: Build pet resume for dog (vaccination history, breed, weight, temperament, references from current landlord/vet)
items.why: GTA buildings increasingly require pet interviews + resumes

items.action: Pull current vet records, rabies cert, recent fecal/heartworm test
items.why: Some buildings require proof; new ON vet will want intake history

items.action: Finalize 6-8 in-person viewing slots for May 25-28 trip; confirm with leasing agents
items.why: Peak season agents overbook; need written confirmation

phases.phase: Phase 2: GTA viewing trip + lease decision
phases.focus: Boots on ground, drive routes, sign lease before month-end

items.action: Prepare rental application packet: last 2 paystubs (or signed THP offer letter), credit report (Equifax pull), 2 references, void cheque, photo ID
items.why: Can submit same-day after a viewing — wins units in competitive market

items.action: Pull Equifax + TransUnion credit reports
items.why: Landlords ask; correcting errors takes 30+ days

items.action: Get THP offer letter / employment verification letter on letterhead with start date and salary
items.why: Best income proof for an attending with no ON pay history yet

items.action: Order certified cheque/draft for first+last month + key deposit (~$8-10K float)
items.why: Cannot e-transfer that amount; bank drafts take 1-2 days

items.action: Final FaceTime backup tours of any new listings posted this week
items.why: Inventory turns over weekly; safety net if trip viewings fall through

items.action: Research Mississauga dog daycares/walkers near shortlisted buildings (Camp Bow Wow Erin Mills, Dogtopia, Pawsh)
items.why: ED night shifts = need backup. Visit during trip.

items.action: Shortlist 3 vet clinics near top 3 buildings (VCA, Erin Mills Animal Hospital, Mississauga Animal Hospital)
items.why: Want to call/visit during trip — vet relationships hard to establish remotely

items.action: TRIP DAY 1: Fly to YYZ, pick up rental car, drive each shortlisted building's commute to Credit Valley at shift-change times (7am, 3pm, 11pm)
items.why: Mississauga traffic is non-linear; QEW/403 can add 25 min unpredictably

items.action: TRIP DAY 2: 4-5 in-person viewings; check cell signal in unit, water pressure, elevator at peak
items.why: Things you only catch in person

items.action: Walk/run candidate routes (Credit River trail, UTM trails, Erindale Park) at top 2-3 buildings
items.why: Run-route quality is a quality-of-life multiplier for shift workers

items.action: TRIP DAY 3: 2-3 follow-up viewings on top contenders; meet leasing agent in person to negotiate
items.why: In-person negotiation gets parking/locker thrown in

items.action: Drop in at top vet clinic + dog daycare to meet staff
items.why: Establishes you as a real local, not a transient

items.action: TRIP DAY 4: Submit Offer to Lease on #1 choice with backup #2 ready; fly back YYZ -> YWG -> Brandon
items.why: Submitting before leaving town signals commitment

items.action: Negotiate lease terms remotely: pet clause, parking spot #, locker, rent escalation, July 1 key handover time
items.why: Standard OREA Form 400 has gaps — riders matter

items.action: Tenant insurance quotes (Square One, Sonnet, TD) — bind policy effective July 1
items.why: Required by 95% of GTA landlords as a condition of lease signing

items.action: SIGN LEASE; wire/draft first+last; obtain signed copy + key handover instructions in writing
items.why: Locks unit; July 1 is 30 days out — landlord's notice window

phases.phase: Phase 3: Book the move + transfer the life
phases.focus: Movers locked, utilities scheduled, credentials finalized

items.action: Book cross-Canada movers (deposit + signed contract); confirm pickup window Jun 26-28, delivery Jun 30-Jul 1
items.why: Peak season; July 1 movers fill 4 weeks out

items.action: Book elevator at new building for July 1 move-in (every condo requires reservation + deposit)
items.why: July 1 elevator slots vanish first; no elevator = no move

items.action: Book elevator at Brandon residence for move-out (Jun 26-28)
items.why: Same problem on departure end

items.action: Set up Alectra Utilities (Mississauga electricity) account; schedule start July 1
items.why: Mississauga is Alectra, NOT Hydro One. Common mistake.

items.action: Set up Enbridge Gas account (if unit has gas); schedule start July 1
items.why: Hot water/heat dependency

items.action: Set up Region of Peel water account if unit is townhouse/freehold (most condos include water)
items.why: Avoid surprise bill

items.action: Internet install booking — Bell Fibe, Rogers Ignite, or Beanfield (check building) — schedule install July 1 or 2
items.why: Install windows are 2-week wait; need WiFi for on-call/charting

items.action: Cell plan review — port number, confirm ON coverage, consider unlocking for THP paging
items.why: MB carrier may have weak GTA roaming patches

items.action: Hospital onboarding: confirm Epic training date, NPI/MRP # in system, paging system enrollment, scrub/locker assignment
items.why: Cannot pick up first shift without active credentials in HIS

items.action: Schedule THP occupational health visit (mandatory pre-employment: TB skin test, immunization review, N95 fit test) for week of Jun 29
items.why: Cannot start clinical work without OH clearance — hard stop

items.action: Email College of Family Physicians of Canada to confirm CCFP-EM designation appears on CPSO public register
items.why: Locum/credentialing checks rely on public-facing data

items.action: Banking: notify TD/RBC/whoever of address change; order new cheques; update direct deposit for THP payroll
items.why: First paycheque ~mid-July; wrong account = delay

items.action: Vet transfer — request full chart from Brandon vet, send to chosen Mississauga vet; book first wellness appt for week of Jul 6
items.why: Continuity of care for dog; new vet wants chart before first visit

items.action: Find primary care MD for Fadi + Nomi — Health Care Connect Ontario registration + cold-call FHTs near Erin Mills
items.why: GTA family doc waitlist 12-18 months; start NOW

items.action: Order packing supplies; start packing non-essentials (books, off-season clothes)
items.why: Movers charge by weight + hours; pre-packed = cheaper

items.action: Forward mail via Canada Post mail forwarding (start date Jun 28, 6 months)
items.why: Catches stragglers — CRA, banks, professional bodies

items.action: Cancel Brandon utilities effective Jun 28 (Manitoba Hydro, internet, water if applicable)
items.why: Avoid double-billing; Manitoba Hydro requires written notice

items.action: Notify Brandon landlord in writing of move-out date + forwarding address for damage deposit return
items.why: Required for deposit return under MB RTA

phases.focus: Final packing, professional admin tail, dog logistics

items.action: Hospital IT: confirm Epic login works, dictation system access, remote VPN credentials for chart catch-up
items.why: IT tickets that fail at this stage become a Day 1 disaster

items.action: Confirm OH clearance booking for Jun 29-30; collect immunization records to bring
items.why: Avoid re-vaccination

items.action: Grocery delivery accounts: Voila (Sobeys), Instacart, Loblaws PC Express — set delivery to new address
items.why: Night shift recovery weeks = no time for grocery runs

items.action: Pharmacy transfer for any ongoing prescriptions (Fadi + Nomi)
items.why: Continuity, avoid lapse

items.action: Dog: refill all meds (NexGard, Heartgard, etc.) for 3-month supply to bridge vet transition
items.why: Bridges any gap before new vet appt

items.action: Dog daycare interviews/trial day at top 2 Mississauga options (book remotely for week of Jul 6)
items.why: Need backup for first night shift block

items.action: Pack essentials box: scrubs, stethoscope, badge clip, chargers, dog food x 1 week, coffee
items.why: Movers' truck may arrive 1-2 days late; need survival kit

items.action: Plan dog transport — fly with dog as cargo/in-cabin, OR drive cross-country; book accordingly
items.why: Air Canada cargo books out for July; if driving, plan 3-day route with pet-friendly hotels

items.action: Confirm with movers: pickup date, COI for both buildings, payment method, inventory list
items.why: Day-of changes = surcharges. Reconfirm 1 week out.

items.action: Final walkthrough Brandon unit; document with photos for damage deposit
items.why: Evidence for any landlord disputes

items.action: Pre-move sleep banking — Fadi gets 8h x 3 nights before drive/flight
items.why: First attending shift on residual sleep debt = bad for everyone

phases.focus: Execute the move, hit the ground running for July 3 shift

items.action: Movers pickup in Brandon; supervise inventory checklist + bill of lading
items.why: Disputes hinge on signed inventory

items.action: Depart Brandon (drive or fly) with dog + essentials box
items.why: Buffer days for delays

items.action: Arrive Mississauga; check into temp accommodation if unit not ready until July 1
items.why: Need a landing pad for the gap day

items.action: THP Occupational Health appointment (TB, fit-test, immunization review)
items.why: Hard requirement before clinical shifts

items.action: THP badge pickup + IT walkthrough + Epic super-user session if available
items.why: Live-system practice beats any training video

items.action: MOVE-IN DAY: key pickup, elevator booking, movers deliver, unpack essentials only
items.why: July 3 shift = unpack later

items.action: Internet install today (if booked); test VPN to THP
items.why: Day 1 charting safety net

items.action: Drive to Credit Valley, park where you'll park on shift day, locate ED entrance, locker, change room, breakroom
items.why: Eliminates Day-1 wayfinding stress

items.action: Stock fridge (Voila/Instacart delivery), set up dog crate + walker contact, test alarm clock x 2
items.why: Operational baseline for first attending shift

items.action: Sleep 9pm; do not stay up unpacking
items.why: First attending shift demands a clear head

items.action: FIRST ATTENDING SHIFT — Credit Valley Hospital ED
items.why: The whole point

items.action: OHIP application at ServiceOntario (3-month wait period waived for returning physicians under MOH agreement — bring CPSO + employment letter)
items.why: Coverage transition from MB Health

items.action: Ontario driver's license transfer at ServiceOntario (within 60 days of permanent move — MB license surrendered)
items.why: Legal requirement HTA s.32; insurance also requires ON license

items.action: Vehicle registration + Ontario plates + safety/emissions if applicable; auto insurance switch to ON carrier
items.why: ON auto insurance is province-locked; MB plates illegal after 30 days

items.action: Update CMPA, CPSO, RCPSC (if applicable), CFPC with new ON address
items.why: Notices/renewals go to address on file

items.action: CRA address update (My Account); update direct deposit for tax refunds
items.why: T4 from THP comes early 2027 to address on file

items.action: First wellness vet visit for dog; register with City of Mississauga animal services + dog license
items.why: Mandatory under Mississauga by-law 98-04

items.action: Establish primary care relationship (first appt for Fadi + Nomi if accepted)
items.why: Don't be the doctor without a doctor

critical_deadlines.label: Confirm CPSO + CMPA active
critical_deadlines.reason: Without these, July 3 shift cannot happen — these have the longest fix-time

critical_deadlines.label: Get cross-Canada mover quotes
critical_deadlines.reason: Peak July 1 season books out 4+ weeks ahead

critical_deadlines.label: Submit Offer to Lease on #1 choice
critical_deadlines.reason: GTA July 1 inventory closes within days; backup option ready

critical_deadlines.label: Sign lease + pay first/last
critical_deadlines.reason: 30-day landlord notice window; tenant insurance must be bound

critical_deadlines.label: Book movers (signed contract + deposit)
critical_deadlines.reason: July 1 is national peak; missing this = no movers

critical_deadlines.label: Book elevator at new building
critical_deadlines.reason: July 1 elevator slots are first to fill in any condo

critical_deadlines.label: Internet install scheduled for Jul 1-2
critical_deadlines.reason: 2-week install lead time; need WiFi for charting/paging
